name: vinary-viewer
description: A reactive ClojureScript (re-frame/re-com) desktop previewer for Markdown, diagrams, images, PDFs, and source code, with live refresh. A new application inspired by vmd.
author: Vinary Tree <dylon@vinarytree.io>

scripts.compile: npm run assets:sync && npm run pdfjs:sync && shadow-cljs compile main renderer
scripts.watch: npm run assets:sync && npm run pdfjs:sync && shadow-cljs watch main renderer
scripts.release: npm run assets:sync && npm run pdfjs:sync && shadow-cljs release main renderer
scripts.compile:cli: npm run grammars:sync && npm run graphics:sync && shadow-cljs compile cli
scripts.release:cli: npm run grammars:sync && npm run graphics:sync && shadow-cljs release cli
scripts.compile:tui: npm run grammars:sync && npm run graphics:sync && shadow-cljs compile tui
scripts.release:tui: npm run grammars:sync && npm run graphics:sync && shadow-cljs release tui
scripts.dev: npm run assets:sync && npm run pdfjs:sync && shadow-cljs compile main renderer && electron .
scripts.screenshots: npm run assets:sync && npm run pdfjs:sync && shadow-cljs compile renderer && xvfb-run -a -s "-screen 0 1280x1024x24" electron --no-sandbox scripts/screenshots.cjs
scripts.screenshots:display: npm run assets:sync && npm run pdfjs:sync && shadow-cljs compile renderer && electron --no-sandbox scripts/screenshots.cjs
scripts.test: shadow-cljs compile test && node dist/test/test.js && node test/ssh-config-smoke.js && node test/ssh-transport-smoke.js && node test/content-service-smoke.js && node test/git-tree-smoke.js && npm run test:cli && npm run test:tui
scripts.test:cli: npm run compile:cli && node test/cli-smoke.js && node test/graphics-smoke.js
scripts.test:electron:release: npm run release && VV_RELEASE=1 electron --no-sandbox test/electron-smoke.js
